questions.question: Design an adder circuit using full adder cells and represent it in VHDL. What are the inputs and outputs of this adder? (5 marks)
Compare and contrast the Gray code and binary code representations of a 4-bit adder. How does this relate to the design of the adder circuit? (10 marks)
questions.hint: Understand the trade-off between simplicity and uniqueness

questions.question: Write a Verilog module for a 4-bit adder using a carry look-ahead scheme. What are the inputs and outputs of this adder? (10 marks)
questions.hint: Verilog syntax and carry look-ahead scheme
